rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MEGAN LOUISE FURTH
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion & Motion To Compel Deposition Of Petitioner Frederick P. Furth & For Protective Order Establishing Dates & Sequence Of Depositions
rulings.Rulings: Beneficiary's motion for a protective order establishing the sequence of depositions is granted. The deposition of Frederick Furth shall commence and be completed prior to the taking of the deposition of Jerzy Sokol. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to a mutually convenient time to conduct the deposition of Frederick Furth. Said deposition shall be completed by October 21, 2005. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to a mutually convenient time to conduct the deposition of Jerzy Sokol. Said deposition shall commence within 10 days after the completion of the deposition of Frederick Furth. (610/BCHAN)
